# DryUI — Get Started

Install @dryui/ui and set up theming in the current project.

## Step 1: Install the component library

```
npm install @dryui/ui
```

## Step 2: Import theme CSS in your root layout

```svelte
<script>
  import '@dryui/ui/themes/default.css';
  import '@dryui/ui/themes/dark.css';
</script>
```

## Step 3: Set the document to automatic light/dark theming

In your `app.html` (SvelteKit) or root HTML file:

```html
<html class="theme-auto">
```

## Step 4: Use components

```svelte
<script>
  import { Button } from '@dryui/ui';
</script>

<Button>Click me</Button>
```

## Optional: Install the CLI

```
npm install -g @dryui/cli
```

Then use `dryui list` to see all components, `dryui info <component>` for API details, and `dryui compose <query>` for composition guidance.

## Full reference

See https://dryui.dev/llms.txt for the complete component API reference.
